obituaries.name: Gloria Deen Stanton
obituaries.summary: Gloria Deen Stanton April 9, 1931 — May 3, 2026 Waco Gloria Deen Stanton, 94, of Waco, Texas, passed away peacefully Tuesday, March 3, 2026. She lived a long and faithful life marked by humility, devotion to family, and a quiet spirit of generosity that touched all who knew her. A service to celebrate Gloria’s life will be held Wednesday, March 11, 2026, at Wilkirson-Hatch-Bailey Funeral Home. Visitation will be at 9:00 a.m., followed by a funeral service at 10:00 a.m. Gloria was born on April 9, 1931, in Baxley, Georgia, to William Grady Deen and Sidney Hutchinson Deen. Growing up in a small town, she graduated from Baxley High School at just 16 years old. Her adventurous spirit led her to

obituaries.name: Billie Ruth Warren
obituaries.summary: Billie Ruth Warren April 8, 1936 — March 9, 2026 Billie Ruth Warren passed away on March 9, 2026 at her home in Bellmead, Texas. She was born in Waco April 8, 1936. Billie went to La Vega schools and also attended MCC where she became a nursing home administrator. She also worked at the Red Cross Blood Center in Waco until retirement. Billie was preceded in death by her parents, Bill and Ruth Cline, her sister, Peggy Nelson and her son, Charles L. Warren, Jr. Survivors include brothers, William Cline and Robert Cline; sister, Mary Walker; daughter, Audrie Hovers; son, Randall Ray and Judy; granddaughter, Kaci Ray Slocum and Caleb; great grandchildren, Harper Slocum and Levi Slocum. obituaries.name: Nancy Carol Oakes
obituaries.summary: Nancy Carol Oakes April 13, 1948 — March 8, 2026 Waco Nancy Carol Oakes, 77, passed away Sunday, March 8, 2026. She was born on April 13, 1948 to William and Lerah Thomas. Nancy was born and raised in Waco, TX and graduated from Waco High School in 1966. After school, she became a loving mother and worked as a Lab Technician for 30 years. Nancy enjoyed her job very much and was loved by many co-workers. She was a resident of Bellmead, TX for 27 years. Nancy was reunited with her daughter, Tracy Porter; parents, William and Lerah Thomas; and brothers, William Thomas, John Thomas and George Thomas in heaven. Left to cherish her memory is her daughter, Robin Hess married to Brent Hess; son, Ron

obituaries.summary: Rose Veronica Twinn Simpson was born on September 11, 1936 in Harlingen, Texas and passed away peacefully in her home in Waco, Texas on March 6, 2026. Visitation is scheduled for Thursday, March 12, 2026 from 5:00 to 7:00 P.M. at OakCrest Funeral Home. The following day, Friday, March 13, 2026, Mass of Christian Burial will be at 10:00 A.M. at St. Louis Catholic Church with Rosary at 9:00 A.M., prior to the service. obituaries.name: Edward Sepulveda
obituaries.summary: Edward Sepulveda December 21, 1959 — March 6, 2026 Edward Sepulveda, age 66, of Waco, Texas, passed away on March 6, 2026, surrounded by his family. Ed was a devoted father, a loving brother, son, and grandfather, and a steady source of love and encouragement for everyone who knew him. He dedicated his life to providing unconditional love and support to his children and family and was his sons’ greatest supporter. He is preceded in death by his parents, Juanita and Fred Sepulveda, Sr., as well as his beloved older brother, Toby. A graveside service will be held in her honor on March 10, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. at Chapel Hill Memorial Park with Pastor Joyce McLaughlin Officiating.

obituaries.name: Nancy Pederson
obituaries.summary: Nancy Pederson October 14, 1942 — March 5, 2026 Nancy Lynn (Parker) Pederson of Waco, passed away Thursday, March 5, 2026 at Baylor Scott & White Hillcrest in Waco. Graveside services will be held 2:00 p.m. Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at White Rock Cemetery near Ross, with David Young officiating. Nancy will lie-in-state from 11:00 a.m. to 1:00 p.m. Tuesday at Aderhold Funeral Home in West. Nancy was born October 14, 1942 in Center, Texas, the daughter of Sallie (Young) and Heber C. Parker, both of whom preceded her in death. She married James Paul Pederson on April 6, 1968 in Center. They were married 57 years prior to her death. obituaries.summary: Elizabeth Jane Smallwood June 15, 2010 — March 5, 2026 Robinson Elizabeth Jane Smallwood, 15, of Robinson, TX, passed away Thursday, March 5, 2026. A Celebration of Life will be 11am, Wednesday, March 11, at Mighty Wind Worship Center, 1100 Washington Ave, Waco, TX. Visitation will be held one hour before, beginning at 10am, at the church. She was born June 15, 2010 in Houston Texas. Lizzy was diagnosed with Pitt Hopkins Syndrome at just 18 months old, but from the very beginning she proved herself to be a true warrior. obituaries.name: Johnny Michael Davis
obituaries.summary: Johnny Michael Davis January 6, 1944 — March 4, 2026 Waco Johnny Michael Davis, of Waco, Texas, passed away peacefully on March 4, 2026, at the age of 82. He was a devoted husband, father, grandfather, businessman, and adventurer who touched the lives of all who knew him. Services will be held Friday, March 13, at 1:00 p.m. at Wilkirson-Hatch-Bailey Funeral Home in Waco, with graveside service immediately following at Waco Memorial Park. Visitation will be Thursday, March 12, 2026, from 5:00 p.m. until 7:00 p.m. at Wilkirson-Hatch-Bailey Funeral Home in Waco. obituaries.name: Cecil Michael George
obituaries.summary: Cecil Michael George March 16, 1949 — March 4, 2026 Waco Cecil Michael George, 76, passed away March 4, 2026, at home. Services will be Tuesday, March 10 at 11:00 at Beacon Hill Baptist Church. Visitation will be at 10:00 that day. Reggie Blake and Danny Dawson will officiate the service. Burial will follow at Waco Memorial Park. Cecil, lovingly known as George, was born March 16, 1949, in San Jose, California. He proudly served in the U.S. Army and was stationed at Fort Hood and during this time, he met his future wife through his buddy, Romie Ball. Cecil and Elaine Sandifer were married September 15, 1973, in Mexia, Texas, and lived their married life in Waco. He retired from Waco ISD and

obituaries.name: Allie Gomez
obituaries.summary: Allie Gomez ,52, of Waco passed away on March 4, 2026 at her daughter’s home surrounded by loved ones after battling Stage IV uterus and endometrial cancer. Services will be held on Thursday, March 12 at 6pm at Oak Crest Funeral Home. A mass will be held the following day at 10am at St.Francis officiated by Father Jazo. Allie Gomez was born in July 31, 1973 to Fidel and Sandra Gomez who she will now be joining in heaven. Allie was outgoing person and loved everyone especially being around her family. She had her first child at 19 where she experienced her first tragic heartbreak after losing her first daughter, Angel, at birth. Allie was a hard worker and always provided for her family. A ye

obituaries.name: Yasmin Lee Barrientos Obituary March 3, 2026 - Grace Gardens Funeral Home & Crematorium
obituaries.summary: Yasmin Lee Barrientos of Waco tx passed away on 3/03/2026 at age 22. She was born to Ada Priscilla Morin and Oscar Barrientos on 2/05/2004 in Brownsville tx. A private family gathering will be held on 3/07/2026. Yasmin was known for her unique quirky humor and loving heart. She had a passion for reading, music and video games. She will be remembered for her infectious compassionate heart and kind soul. Yasmin is survived by her mother Ada Priscilla Morin , her brother Andrew Barrientos, sister Bella Nino and her loving cats Oliver and Ollie. Of all the special gifts in life however great or small, to have you as my daughter was the greatest gift of all.

obituaries.name: Wanda Marie Ryals
obituaries.summary: Wanda Marie Ryals June 25, 1936 — March 3, 2026 Robinson Wanda Marie (Wilson) Ryals, age 89, of Robinson, Texas, went to Paradise on Tuesday, March 3, 2026. She died peacefully in her sleep, which was always her desire. Visitation will be held on Thursday, March 12 from 6:00-8:00 p.m., at Pecan Grove Funeral Home in Waco. A memorial service will be held on Friday, March 13 at 10:00 a.m. at the New Road Church of Christ in Waco. A private burial will be held at a later date at the Gholson Cemetery. Wanda was born on June 25, 1936 in Beaumont, Texas to the late William Marvin and Dula Lee (White) Wilson. She graduated from South Park High School in Beaumont in 1954. Wanda accepted Jesus Christ

obituaries.name: Maria Celia Perez Chavez
obituaries.summary: Maria Celia Perez Chavez December 4, 1950 — March 3, 2026 Maria Celia Perez Chavez, age 75, of West, passed away Tuesday morning, March 3, 2026 at Ascension Providence Hospital in Waco. A rosary will be recited 5:00 p.m. Monday at Aderhold Funeral Home, followed by visitation until 7:00 p.m. Mass of Christian Burial will be celebrated 11:00 a.m. Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at St. Mary's Catholic Church of the Assumption, with Rev. Timothy Vaverek as celebrant. Burial will follow at St. Mary's Cemetery. Celia was born on December 4, 1950, in Chalchihuites, Mexico, to Florencio and Florencia (Serrato) Chavez Lopez. She began her early education at Vasdespino Catholic School and carried her learned

obituaries.name: Charlotte Anne Phillips
obituaries.summary: Charlotte Phillips was born in Waco, Texas to Ella Clay (Jones) Philips and James Ray Phillips. She was primarily reared by her maternal grandparents, Katherine and James Ratliff in Waco. She attended Waco High School, graduating in 1959. She worked at multiple jobs in the DFW area and in Washington state before returning to Waco. She worked at Graham Embroidery, and later as a draftsman in the construction industry and at the Veterans Administration Hospital. In 1979 she moved to Austin and worked in the architectural field as a construction specifier. Later she was served as a contract manager for the city of Austin. Charlotte met her partner, Margaret Sanders, in 1982 in Austin, and the t

obituaries.name: Donald Howard Antis
obituaries.summary: Donald Howard Antis June 17, 1947 — March 2, 2026 Katy, Texas formerly of Waco, Texas Listen to Obituary Donald “Don” Howard Antis, age 78, passed away on Monday, March 2, 2026, at Caydance Assisted Living in Katy, Texas. Don was the devoted husband of the late Claudia Antis for 55 years. The two met in 1965 while working at the Travelers Insurance Company, beginning a lifetime of partnership. A proud veteran, Don served in the United States Army in Korea from 1968 to 1969. Following his service, he dedicated 40 years to healing others as a Physical Therapist. After tenures at Hillcrest Hospital and Waco Rehab, he fulfilled a professional dream by opening his own practice, Bosque River Physi

obituaries.name: Betty Stasny Belcher
obituaries.summary: Betty Sybil Stasny Belcher was born on April 29, 1924 to Frank J. Stasny and Rosie K. Sirny Stasny in Taylor, Texas. On April 2, 1948 she married RW (Buddy) Belcher in Bryan, Texas. They were married 51 years when her husband passed away on July 4, 1999. She was a homemaker and she enjoyed making her home nice and taking care of her plants. She also enjoyed camping, fishing, and being with family. She was preceded in death by her husband, RW (Buddy) Belcher; parents, Frank J. Stasny and Rosie K. Sirny Stasny; sister, Julia R. Barrington; niece, Doris Jean Driska; and brother-in-law, Willie B. Driska. She is survived by her sister, Ella Marie Driska; nieces, Rosanne Glinski, Theresa Driska, J

obituaries.name: Stefanie Reed
obituaries.summary: Stefanie Reed November 5, 1971 — March 1, 2026 Stefanie Dionne (Walts) Reed, age 54, of West, passed away early Sunday morning, March 1, 2026 at Baylor Scott & White Hillcrest Hospital in Waco. The family will receive visitors from 5:00 to 6:30 p.m. today Monday, March 2, 2026 at the West Church of Christ. A Memorial Service will be held 2:00 p.m. Sunday, March 22, 2026 at West Church of Christ, with Minister Ernie Albrecht officiating. Stefanie was born on November 5, 1971, in Waco, the cherished daughter of Michael Walts and Diane (Neel) Walts Parma. obituaries.name: Sharon Virginia Holmes
obituaries.summary: Sharon Virginia Holmes August 19, 1947 — March 1, 2026 Kosse Sharon Virginia (DuBose) Holmes, 78, passed away on Sunday, March 1, 2026. Funeral services will be 10:00 a.m., Saturday, March 7, at Pecan Grove Funeral Home, with Pastor Robert Nelson officiating. Burial will follow at Valley Mills Cemetery. The family will receive visitors from 5 – 7:00 p.m., Friday, March 6, at the funeral home. Sharon was born in DeRidder, Louisiana, to Aubrey and Pinnice (Whiddon) DuBose. She married Curtis Calvin Holmes on September 7, 1963. She faithfully supported her husband in his calling to serve the Lord, standing beside him with strength and unwavering devotion. obituaries.name: Donald Jon Cann
obituaries.summary: Donald Jon Cann October 31, 1938 — March 1, 2026 Sumter, South Carolina Listen to Obituary The Grand Adventure Begins Lt. Col. Donald J. Cann began his life appropriately on Halloween in 1938 — a day well-suited for a man who would spend 87 years delighting in surprise, mischief, and good stories. On March 1, 2026, he took his final journey while on a road trip — exactly where he would have wanted to be — somewhere between a new destination and a promising local restaurant. He did not so much pass away as set off ahead of us, itinerary in hand. obituaries.name: James Howard Pitts
obituaries.summary: James Howard Pitts March 12, 1936 — February 28, 2026 Bruceville, Texas Listen to Obituary James Howard "Killer" Pitts of Lorena, Texas passed away peacefully, surrounded by family on Saturday, February 28, 2026. He was born in Dawson, Texas on March 12, 1936. He graduated from Dawson High School and excelled in football, track and baseball. He was an avid golfer and lifelong Baylor Bear football fan. James retired from LeHigh cement company where he was a supervisor for more than thirty years. He was preceded in death by his parents, Howard and Iona Pitts and a sister, Beverly Pitts. obituaries.name: Linda Fae Hineline
obituaries.summary: Linda Fae Hineline July 15, 1944 — February 27, 2026 Waco, Texas Listen to Obituary Linda Fae Hineline, age 81, of Waco, Texas, passed away peacefully on February 27, 2026, in Waco. A celebration of her life will be held at 11:00 a.m. on May 22, 2026, at Central Texas State Veterans Cemetery in Killeen, Texas. Linda was born on July 15, 1944, in Waterloo, Iowa, to James William Norfolk and Helen Fae Thompson Norfolk. From an early age, she found joy in art and reading, and she cherished time spent with her family and beloved pets. Those early passions for creativity and connection remained constant throughout her life. A woman of remarkable strength and versatility, Linda lived a life define

obituaries.name: Daniel Shown
obituaries.summary: Daniel Shown August 23, 1959 — February 27, 2026 Daniel Robert Shown was born on August 23, 1959, to John Ben Shown and Earnestine Yarbrough. Raised in Waco, Texas, Daniel grew up with strong values of faith, family, and service—principles that would guide him throughout his life. As a young man, Daniel was a standout athlete for the La Vega Pirates in Waco. His talent and determination on the gridiron earned him a football scholarship to Cisco Junior College, where he played linebacker for two years. While at Cisco, Daniel obtained an associate degree in Criminal Justice, laying the foundation for the career he had dreamed of since high school. In June 1980, Daniel was accepted into the Tex

obituaries.name: Carol Ann Jortner
obituaries.summary: Carol Ann Jortner November 17, 1939 — February 27, 2026 Waco Carol Ann Jortner, 86, of Waco, passed away Friday, February 27, 2026, in Waco. A graveside service will be held at 1:00 p.m. Wednesday, March 4, at Rodef Sholom Cemetery in Waco. Carol was born November 17, 1939, in New York City to John Effinger and Winifred Lee Effinger. She later graduated with a B.A. from Hillins College. She was an educator during her working career. She was preceded in death by her parents and her husband, Bernard Jortner. Carol is survived by her daughter, Susan Deely of Georgetown; her sons, David Jortner of Hewitt and Adam Jortner of Wolfville, Nova Scotia; and seven grandchildren. The family invites you

obituaries.name: Barbara Helen Caudle
obituaries.summary: Barbara Helen Caudle July 17, 1938 — February 27, 2026 Waco, Texas formerly of Abilene, Texas Listen to Obituary Barbara Helen Caudle, 87, formerly of Abilene, passed away peacefully at Living Springs in Waco, TX. Graveside services will be held Wednesday at 2:00 pm at Cottonwood Cemetery. Born July 17, 1938, in Throckmorton to Horace and Essie Peacock, Helen was a woman of professional excellence and deep family devotion. A skilled administrative assistant, she served at Catalina Foothills Schools, General Dynamics/Lockheed, and Hendrick Hospital. obituaries.name: James W. Harrison
obituaries.summary: James W. Harrison August 23, 1925 — February 26, 2026 West Columbia, Texas James W. Harrison, 100, of West Columbia, Texas, passed away Thursday, February 26, 2026. A private family burial will be held at White Rock Cemetery in Ross. In his own words as recently expressed: "I have had a wonderful life. I was married for 62 years to a beautiful, incredible woman. We were blessed with 3 great and loving children; 5 grandchildren; and 7 great grandchildren. I had a fulfilling career for which I was able to travel all over the world, as project manager for Dow Chemical. I have been greatly blessed in my long life" Thanks for everything, dad.
